channel.title: MWCGA Match Previews
channel.description: Every 2026 World Cup match previewed by Hank and Sal — scouting reports, family stakes, fearless predictions.
channel.itunes:author: The Commissioner

item.title: ⚔️ 🟡 Barnes vs Will 🔴 — Belgium vs Iran — Match Preview
